title: Hermitcraft Server Founded
description: Generikb launches Hermitcraft on Minecraft 1.2.5 with ten founding members — 777static777, Biffa2001, Generikb, Hypnotizd, Keralis, Kiershar, Red3yz, Sokar, Topmass, and Xisumavoid — marking the start of what would become one of the longest-running Minecraft SMPs.

title: First Hermitcraft Episodes Published to YouTube
description: Generikb and several founding members publish the first Hermitcraft Let's Play episodes on YouTube on launch day, establishing the series' tradition of content-creator-driven survival gameplay.

title: Server Grows Through Multiple Minecraft Updates
description: The Season 1 server continues through Minecraft updates 1.3, 1.4, and 1.5, growing from 10 to nearly 30 members over the course of the season.

title: BdoubleO100 Joins Hermitcraft
description: BdoubleO100 joins Hermitcraft on January 5, 2013, alongside Juicetra, Skyzm, and Pungence — BdoubleO100 would go on to become one of the server's most beloved builders.

title: Generikb Departs Hermitcraft
description: Founder Generikb leaves Hermitcraft at the end of Season 1, in the only departure of the server's founding member.

title: Xisumavoid Becomes Permanent Server Administrator
description: Following Generikb's departure, Xisumavoid takes over as server administrator — a role he would hold for every subsequent season.

title: Season 2 Launch Under Xisumavoid
description: Hermitcraft Season 2 begins on Minecraft 1.6.x with Xisumavoid firmly established as server administrator and a rebuilt roster of returning and new members.

title: MumboJumbo Joins Hermitcraft
description: MumboJumbo joins Hermitcraft in Season 2, uploading his first episode 'HermitCraft: Episode 0 - Welcome Home' and beginning his long career as the server's foremost redstone engineer.

title: Five Future Long-Term Hermits Join Season 2
description: ZombieCleo, TangoTek, FalseSymmetry, iJevin, and xBCrafted all join Hermitcraft during Season 2, each remaining active members for many subsequent seasons.

title: TangoTek Joins to Fix MumboJumbo's Iron Farm
description: TangoTek is whitelisted specifically to fix MumboJumbo's broken iron farm — and simply never leaves, beginning one of the server's longest-running careers.

title: Generikb Briefly Returns to Season 2
description: Generikb makes a brief return to Hermitcraft during Season 2 before departing permanently.

title: Season 2 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 2 concludes after approximately 16 months, with Minecraft 1.8's arrival prompting a fresh world reset for Season 3.

title: Season 3 Launch on Amplified Terrain
description: Season 3 launches on Minecraft 1.8 using the Amplified world type — the only Hermitcraft season ever to do so — creating dramatically tall and treacherous terrain.

title: Docm77 and ImpulseSV Join Season 3
description: Technical powerhouses Docm77 and ImpulseSV join Hermitcraft in Season 3, both becoming long-term core members and shaping the server's redstone culture.

title: EthosLab Joins Hermitcraft
description: EthosLab, widely regarded as one of Minecraft's greatest technical players, joins Hermitcraft in March 2015 and begins collaborating with Docm77.

title: EthosLab and Docm77 Collaborate on Early Builds
description: Following EthosLab's arrival, he and Docm77 build together, establishing a friendship and creative partnership that continues across many seasons.

title: Season 3 Server Seed: 318041875063143073
description: Season 3 uses the publicly known seed 318041875063143073, one of the earliest confirmed Hermitcraft seeds on record.

title: Season 3 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 3 concludes after approximately 17 months as Minecraft 1.9's combat overhaul makes a world reset an attractive fresh start.

title: Season 4 Launch — First Themed Districts
description: Season 4 launches on Minecraft 1.9 and introduces formally structured themed districts for the first time: North and South Residential, Orange Entertainment (The Danglands), and Yellow Farming.

title: The Kingdomcraft Five Join Hermitcraft
description: Five players from the Kingdomcraft server — GoodTimesWithScar, Iskall85, Cubfan135, Rendog, and Welsknight — join together on PythonGB's recommendation, dramatically expanding the roster's culture.

title: VintageBeef Joins Hermitcraft
description: VintageBeef joins Hermitcraft in Season 4, becoming a long-term member and part of the NHO group in later seasons.

title: The Danglands Minigame District Built
description: EthosLab and Docm77 construct The Danglands, an entertainment district featuring Whack-A-Mole, Boat Racing, The Fat Princess, and Connect 4.

title: 5K Club Established
description: FalseSymmetry, Cubfan135, and GoodTimesWithScar found the 5K Club — an exclusive group for Hermits who have walked 5,000 blocks from the spawn point.

title: Season 4 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 4 concludes after approximately 13 months, with Season 5 beginning shortly after on Minecraft 1.11.

title: Season 5 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 5 launches on Minecraft 1.11 as an open, mega-base-focused season without a dominant server-wide narrative.

title: StressMonster101 and Zedaph Join Season 5
description: StressMonster101 (known for ornate fantasy builds) and Zedaph (known for wacky contraptions and game shows) join Hermitcraft as new members.

title: BdoubleO100 Returns After Extended Absence
description: BdoubleO100 returns to Hermitcraft in Season 5 after an extended period away from the server.

title: NHO (New Hermit Order) Forms
description: BdoubleO100, Docm77, EthosLab, and VintageBeef form the NHO (New Hermit Order), an informal collaborative group that builds and plays together throughout Season 5.

title: "Is That Sheep Looking At Me?" Game Show
description: Zedaph hosts one of his first Hermitcraft game shows during Season 5, establishing his reputation as the server's premier game-show designer.

title: Season 5 Ends — Minecraft 1.13 Drives World Reset
description: Season 5 concludes after approximately 15 months as Minecraft 1.13's significant terrain generation changes make a fresh world reset the logical next step.

title: Season 11 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 11 launches on Minecraft 1.21.x with 25 returning members, two Hermits from Season 10 choosing not to return.

title: Decked Out 3 Begins
description: TangoTek starts construction on Decked Out 3, the third iteration of the celebrated dungeon-crawler card game series begun in Season 7.

title: GoodTimesWithScar Builds Shopping District
description: GoodTimesWithScar takes on the role of building Season 11's Shopping District from scratch, continuing his tradition as one of the server's great community builders.

title: ZITS and Poe-Poe Groups Continue into Season 11
description: The ZITS group (Zedaph, ImpulseSV, TangoTek, Skizzleman) and Poe-Poe group (GoodTimesWithScar, Grian, Cubfan135, Skizzleman) from Season 10 carry their collaborations into Season 11.

title: New Hermits Join Season 11
description: Season 11 welcomes new and returning faces including PearlescentMoon, with several guest appearances expanding the cast beyond the core Season 10 roster.

title: Season 6 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 6 officially launches on Minecraft 1.13, the longest season to date at the time.

title: Grian Joins Hermitcraft
description: Grian joins Hermitcraft for the first time, going on to become its most-subscribed creator.

title: The Architechs Form
description: Grian, MumboJumbo, and Iskall85 form The Architechs building collective in Season 6, Episodes 4–5.

title: Sahara Mega-Shop Opens
description: The Architechs open Sahara, a fully automated mega-shop with ice-duct delivery, described as 'Amazon Prime in Minecraft, but faster'.

title: ConCorp Shopping Empire Established
description: GoodTimesWithScar and Cubfan135 establish ConCorp as a dominant Shopping District retail empire.

title: Season 6 Civil War Begins — Team G (G-Team) Forms
description: After Iskall85 builds a Grian statue with diorite 'bird droppings', Grian assembles Team G (the G-Team) to wage the Season 6 Civil War.

title: Team S.T.A.R. Forms
description: Docm77 leads Team S.T.A.R. against the G-Team, with MumboJumbo secretly acting as a double agent feeding information back to Grian.

title: Poultry Man First Appearance
description: Grian debuts his alter ego Poultry Man, a chicken-themed vigilante, in Season 6 Episode 22.

title: Demise Season 6 Begins
description: The first Demise game launches — a last-man-standing survival challenge costing 50 diamonds to enter, with diamond armor banned.

title: Iskall85 Wins Demise Season 6
description: Iskall85 wins Season 6 Demise as the last surviving Hermit, over 2 months after the game began.

title: Season 6 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 6 concludes after ~19 months, the longest season in Hermitcraft history at the time.

title: Season 7 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 7 launches on Minecraft 1.15.2, coinciding with the onset of global COVID-19 lockdowns.

title: Head Games Economy Game Ends
description: ZombieCleo's Head Games event concludes, awarding 288 diamonds to the winner of the head-collection competition.

title: 1.16 Nether Update — Nether Reset
description: Minecraft 1.16 drops and the Season 7 server resets the Nether, opening up new biomes for exploration.

title: Mycelium Resistance vs HEP Turf War
description: Grian's underground Mycelium Resistance fights GoodTimesWithScar's HEP (HermitCraft Environmental Protection) over whether the Shopping District should be grass or mycelium.

title: Mycelium Resistance Wins 6-3
description: The Mycelium Resistance defeats HEP in a nine-game minigame series, winning 6 games to 3 and settling the turf war.

title: Decked Out Opens
description: TangoTek builds and opens Decked Out — a dungeon-crawler card game considered one of the greatest Minecraft creations ever.

title: Season 7 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 7 concludes after ~15.5 months.

title: Season 8 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 8 launches on Minecraft 1.17 (Caves & Cliffs Part 1), with GeminiTay and PearlescentMoon joining as new members.

title: Boatem Group Forms
description: Five Hermits — Grian, MumboJumbo, GoodTimesWithScar, ImpulseSV, and PearlescentMoon — settle together and form the Boatem group.

title: Boatem Pole Constructed
description: The Boatem group builds the Boatem Pole — a towering totem of boats, beds, and a crafting bench that becomes an iconic Season 8 landmark.

title: MumboJumbo Elected Server Mayor
description: MumboJumbo runs for and wins the position of Hermitcraft server mayor through a diamond-donation campaign.

title: Big Moon Storyline Begins
description: The Moon is observed growing dangerously large in the sky, sparking server-wide conspiracy theories, cults, and scientific panic.

title: Season 8 Ends — Big Moon Crashes
description: The Moon crashes into the planet, ending the Season 8 narrative and closing Hermitcraft's shortest vanilla season after just 6 months.

title: Season 9 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 9 launches on Minecraft 1.18.1 using the Fabric mod loader, with zero roster changes from Season 8.

title: Server Updates to Minecraft 1.19
description: The Season 9 server updates to Minecraft 1.19 (The Wild Update), adding the Deep Dark and Mangrove biomes.

title: Cyberpunk Mega-Base Collab
description: ImpulseSV and BdoubleO100 collaborate on a large cyberpunk city mega-base and gaming district in Season 9.

title: The Soup Group Forms
description: ImpulseSV, PearlescentMoon, and GeminiTay form The Soup Group, a close collaborative trio for Season 9.

title: Decked Out 2 Construction Begins
description: TangoTek begins over 11 months of construction on Decked Out 2, a massively expanded sequel to his Season 7 dungeon-crawler.

title: Decked Out 2 Opens to Players
description: After 11+ months of construction, Decked Out 2 opens and becomes a server-wide event, with Hermits competing for leaderboard rankings.

title: Season 9 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 9 concludes after ~21.5 months, making it the longest season in Hermitcraft history.

title: Season 10 Launch
description: Hermitcraft Season 10 launches with 27 members — the largest roster in server history — including newcomers Skizzleman and SmallishBeans.

title: Demise Season 10 Begins — Reaper Mechanic
description: Demise returns with a new Reaper mechanic: eliminated players become Reapers who hunt survivors using traps and indirect PvP.

title: FalseSymmetry Wins Demise Season 10
description: FalseSymmetry becomes the last Hermit standing in Demise Season 10 and is awarded the Joker Permit to sell any item in the Shopping District.

title: Hermit Permits Economy System Introduced
description: Grian proposes the Hermit Permits system, tying Shopping District trading licenses to Demise results and creating a new season-long economy.

title: ZITS Group Forms
description: Zedaph, ImpulseSV, TangoTek, and Skizzleman form the ZITS collaborative group in Season 10.

title: Poe-Poe Group Forms
description: GoodTimesWithScar, Grian, Cubfan135, and Skizzleman form the Poe-Poe collaborative group in Season 10.

title: Season 10 Ends
description: Hermitcraft Season 10 concludes after approximately 20 months.
